features: Timesheet lifecycle (Draft, Submitted, Approved, Rejected, Locked)
Workspace context and membership management APIs
Tenant-safe query scoping across core entities
Lazy-loaded reports and optimized frontend chunks

changes: Added workspace and user domain foundation for multi-user deployments
Added role-aware authorization policies and protected mutation endpoints
Implemented full time entry lifecycle with transition APIs
Added workspace context and user management API endpoints
Integrated lifecycle controls and status filtering in Time Entries UI
Optimized frontend bundle with route-level and chart-level lazy loading
Stabilized timer pause/resume unit tests by removing timing-based flakiness
Advanced table features (resize, reorder, sticky headers)
